error_signature: missing login button for Google Contacts API
title: Missing login button for Google Contacts API
symptom: The Google Contacts node in n8n does not display a login button, preventing access. Additionally, existing credentials show missing fields.
not_this_if: The issue does not occur when the environment variable is removed
root_cause: The presence of the environment variable 'N8N_DEFAULT_LOCALE' can interfere with the rendering of the login button and credential fields in the Google Contacts node, leading to a broken user interface.
agent_instruction: Remove the 'N8N_DEFAULT_LOCALE' environment variable from your docker-compose file and restart n8n.
